summary: Guard planner files against duplicate sections

steps.title: Survey existing duplicate-key offenders
steps.notes: Inventory plans with repeated keys (e.g. duplicate steps arrays) and capture evidence under `_report/usage/plan-lint/`. Latest scan (2025-10-07) flagged `_plans/2025-09-23-repo-hygiene.plan.json` (duplicate `status`) and `_plans/2025-10-06-teof-btc-scoreboard.plan.json` (duplicate `receipts`). Remediated duplicates in `_plans/2025-09-23-repo-hygiene.plan.json` and `_plans/2025-10-06-teof-btc-scoreboard.plan.json`.

steps.title: Add planner lint for duplicate keys
Clean existing plans and document rule

checkpoint.description: Planner validator blocks duplicate keys; existing plans deduped with receipts
checkpoint.notes: Validator migration tracked in consolidation plan.
